subject: The Colossal Titan, a massive skinless giant figure looming over a structure, from the Attack on Titan series
description: A towering, muscular figure rendered in deep red — the exposed musculature of a Titan with no skin — dominates the upper portion of the image. The figure leans forward over what appears to be a large structure or wall below. The image is relatively small in resolution and marked with a SAMPLE watermark. The composition conveys extreme scale, with the titan's mass dwarfing any architectural elements visible beneath it. The overall palette is deep red and dark tones.
foreground: Massive red muscular giant figure bearing down from above
background: Structure or wall below, dark sky
